subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God, ye have an assembly well-ordered and adorned, and are engaged in service to the Word of God and the beloved ones of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الحمد لله محفلی آراسته دارید و بخدمت کلمه الله و احبای الهی در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @bringing forth results; fruit, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
